name: Breads
subtitle: Slow-risen and table-ready.
shortDescription: Slow-risen loaves, focaccia, and seasonal bakes made for the table.
description: From a crusty loaf for dinner to a tender focaccia for sharing, each bake is made in small batches with time, care, and uncomplicated ingredients.
galleryCaptions: ["Fresh morning loaves","Focaccia for the table","Seasonal bakes"]
customizationNote: Ask about flavours, quantities, and a bake that suits your table.

name: Cookies
subtitle: Buttery favourites to share.
shortDescription: Buttery classics and playful seasonal boxes for gifting or sharing.
description: Comforting classics, seasonal details, and gift-ready boxes make these cookies an easy way to share something sweet.
galleryCaptions: ["Classic cookie box","Seasonal sweet treats","A thoughtful gift"]
customizationNote: Choose your favourites, add a note, or build a box for your occasion.

name: Cakes
subtitle: Made for celebrations.
shortDescription: Thoughtful celebration cakes with beautiful, unfussy finishes.
description: Celebration cakes should feel special without feeling overdone. Each is made to bring a delicious, personal touch to your gathering.
galleryCaptions: ["A soft, simple finish","Cake for a gathering","Personal celebration details"]
customizationNote: Share your date, serving size, and a little about the celebration.

name: Custom orders
subtitle: Made for your occasion.
shortDescription: A little something made exactly for your occasion.
description: A custom order starts with the occasion and ends with a thoughtful detail that makes it feel like yours.
galleryCaptions: ["A custom bakery moment","Thoughtful finishing touches","Made for sharing"]
customizationNote: Tell us the occasion and we will explore a delicious fit.

name: Custom sewing
subtitle: Made to fit your life.
shortDescription: Made-to-order pieces that fit your life and your style.
description: Thoughtfully sewn pieces begin with a useful idea, a lovely fabric, and attention to the small details that make something feel personal.
galleryCaptions: ["A considered fabric detail","Made for every day","Finished by hand"]
customizationNote: Bring a fabric, an idea, or simply a need - we will find the right direction.

name: Repairs & refreshes
subtitle: For pieces worth keeping.
shortDescription: Careful mending for the pieces worth keeping.
description: A favourite item can often have more life in it. Careful repair and refresh work helps useful, meaningful pieces stay in your everyday rotation.
galleryCaptions: ["A careful repair","Fresh detail, familiar piece","Ready for another season"]
customizationNote: Share a photo and a short note about the repair you have in mind.

name: Gifts
subtitle: Personal and made to remember.
shortDescription: Personalized fabric creations made to be remembered.
description: The best gifts feel considered. These handmade pieces are created to mark a person, a milestone, or a simple moment of care.
galleryCaptions: ["A gift with a story","Personal finishing touch","Ready to be remembered"]
customizationNote: Tell us who it is for and what you would love the piece to say.

name: Seasonal crafts
subtitle: Handmade warmth for the season.
shortDescription: Small batches of handmade warmth for every season.
description: Small seasonal details make a home and a gathering feel especially welcoming. These pieces are made in limited, thoughtful batches.
galleryCaptions: ["A seasonal detail","Handmade for the home","A little warmth"]
customizationNote: Ask what is currently in season or about a small custom batch.
